description: NATO member states formally commit to a 3.5% GDP defense spending floor by 2028, replacing the prior 2% target. The binding commitment includes a timeline enforced through the NATO Defence Planning Process (NDPP). Major members (DEU, FRA, POL, GBR) have already passed or announced supplementary defense budgets.
user_notes: Acelerador del catalizador estructural struct_nato_rearmament. La primera pata del trade ya ejecutada. Este evento refuerza la segunda pata — order books de 3-5 años para prime contractors. El novelty_score de 72 refleja que el 2% ya era conocido; la novedad es el step-change a 3.5% con timeline vinculante.
